We've made important progress to combat addiction and bring down overdoses, but we can't let up in the fight now.
 
I was grateful to meet with leaders of organizations that help Granite Staters get into and stay in recovery and talk about what more we need to do. https://t.co/Gjb21xxkAM

The President’s cynical, dishonest, and frankly, unhinged speech tonight is just another reminder that he is not focused on the needs of the American people. 

As his illegal war rages on, gas prices surge, and millions of Americans go without health care, the President is

ICE's reckless behavior, most recently in Maine, is undeniable evidence of an agency that urgently needs both oversight and reform. 

https://t.co/6PunT7JhZT

New reports show that instead of bringing down the cost of health care, Secretary RFK Jr. pushed to spend $5 billion in taxpayer dollars to “investigate” the already widely debunked link between vaccines and autism.

RFK Jr. needs to resign.

https://t.co/tzpBBPH5Ix

During the 2025 flu season, hundreds of children died and RFK Jr.’s response was to personally order the CDC to stop all promotion of the flu vaccine.
 
President Trump’s new pick to lead the CDC won’t say whether she would follow that order. That’s disqualifying. https://t.co/KdRpboakdh

Ridiculous and un-American. The American people deserve a president who cares more about putting money in people’s pockets than he does about putting his face on people’s money.

https://t.co/D5BSbvCxUL

Almost five months ago, Donald Trump bypassed Congress to launch his illegal, reckless, and poorly thought-out war with Iran. Since then, American service members have died, American consumers and businesses have seen gas prices skyrocket, and yet Americans are less safe than

As President Trump resumes his war with Iran, gas costs are already increasing again.

This report shows that Americans have now paid $56.4 billion more for gas since the start of the war, while Trump says he doesn’t think about the financial situation of Americans.

New Hampshire's family farms are essential to our economy, our communities, and our way of life. It was great to visit Beaver Pond Farm to thank the Nelsons for their hard work.
 
As costs continue to rise, we must ensure our family farms have the support they need to keep https://t.co/Eaw1j9Finm

I’m very sorry to hear of the passing of my colleague @LindseyGrahamSC, who dedicated his life to serving the people of South Carolina and his country. Lindsey had a passion for representing our nation abroad - and anyone who spent time with him, particularly when traveling

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is an important step toward addressing our housing shortage — banning Wall Street from buying up single-family homes and making it easier to build more homes. 

President Trump chose politics over this effort to lower housing costs, but I'm

Granite Staters count on getting their mail on time. Today I talked with NH postal workers about how they aren’t being given the resources to make that happen, as Trump’s USPS focuses instead on making it hard for people to vote. https://t.co/IcrI0vINCN

It was great to visit Concord's landfill solar project. By turning otherwise unused land into a source of electricity, projects like this help strengthen our grid, expand our energy supply, and lower costs for Granite Staters. https://t.co/DIASpTK5mJ

We need more creative solutions like this in order to tackle New Hampshire's housing crisis. That's why I supported the bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing bill, which will cut red tape for builders and help turn more good ideas into homes that hardworking families can

The Roosevelt East Apartments in Keene turn an old school building into safe, affordable homes for Granite Staters. I’m grateful to everyone who worked together to make today's opening a reality. https://t.co/pNSSR3ulAQ

The bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing bill that I helped push will help us build new homes that families can afford across New Hampshire. President Trump’s refusal to sign it shows that he doesn’t care about your housing costs.

Lowering housing costs requires building more housing. 
 
Today I joined a ribbon cutting for the Village at Technology Hill, new middle-class housing in Londonderry that will help more families stay in New Hampshire. https://t.co/9PaWZG0uHn
Want to know how to celebrate America’s 250th? Start by thanking a veteran. https://t.co/hc32eDzmEH

Happy Independence Day! For 250 years, Americans have worked to build a more perfect union. Here in New Hampshire, that legacy lives on in the people who step up, serve their communities, and look out for one another.
One of the largest pharmaceutical companies in the world is gaming the system to pad its profits while many Americans continue to pay sky-high prices for cancer medication. https://t.co/rlzzycgarR

NEW: President Trump's so-called One Big Beautiful Bill and tariffs have cost middle class families hundreds while America's wealthiest get massive tax breaks.

This report shows how Trump’s tax and tariff policies hurt teachers, fire fighters, health care aides, and many more. https://t.co/lGHDmZwROn

Families, businesses, and the economy all suffer when working parents can't afford child care for their kids. That's why I've introduced a bipartisan bill to create a Business Child Care Liaison at the IRS to educate business owners about available child care tax cuts for them

Child care tax cuts often go unused by both families and businesses due to a lack of awareness. 

This report walks through sample scenarios that show how businesses and families can put the credits to work, reduce employee turnover, and save thousands on child care.

62 years ago, the Civil Rights Act affirmed a simple but powerful principle: every American deserves equal treatment under the law. As we reflect on that progress, we must remain committed to protecting the rights and freedoms that generations fought to secure.
Granite Staters tell me that they are forced to choose between paying rent and paying for prescription drugs — and this Administration keeps making things worse. https://t.co/EMXVlNzFvf

Housing costs are hurting Granite Staters. Yesterday, @RepChrisPappas and I discussed how the bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act can help. President Trump is standing in the way of lower costs by refusing to sign this bill. https://t.co/8ZH6TeglV6

Granite Staters are beyond exhausted by the flood of scam calls, texts, and emails.
 
Scams have a bigger impact on the global economy than the illicit drug trade — it’s essential to create a ReportScams​.Gov portal to help victims report scams and get help. https://t.co/ZeRt9t2upx

People born in the U.S. are American citizens. President Trump's effort to undermine this principle was wrong and unconstitutional. 

I'm glad the court struck it down — and thank you to the Granite Staters who helped protect this foundational right.

Families can’t afford their mortgage and rent right now. Congress passed a bipartisan bill to bring down costs. 

The President’s response? 

“Yawn” 

https://t.co/na3CPk4Ydu

It was an honor to present the Congressional Gold Medal to the family of NH native Doris Moore, who served in the all-Black, all-female 6888th Central Postal Directory Battalion during WWII.
 
Remembering Granite Staters like Doris ensures that remarkable service receives the https://t.co/moRWTbWMiC

While American families struggle to make ends meet and afford health care costs, the Trump Administration is busy handing out special favors.

People deserve answers. https://t.co/dAgnDw7M0A

At just 9 years old, Emelia Ajavon of Grantham founded Chess Club 4 Kids after noticing a lack of opportunities for students to learn chess in the Upper Valley.  
 
Her leadership and dedication to her community is why I am proud to name her June’s Granite Stater of the Month.

Four years ago today, the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, stripping away a woman’s fundamental freedom to make her own health care decisions. This anniversary is a reminder of the ongoing fight for women to be treated as full and equal citizens in our country.

President Trump is suddenly refusing to sign the largest bipartisan housing affordability bill in decades just to strong-arm Congress into making it harder for Americans to vote.
 
Yet another example of how he puts himself before the needs of hard-working families. https://t.co/AasQBTPJoJ

Big news: the Senate passed a major housing affordability package that bans Wall Street from buying up single-family homes.

This is an important step toward building more homes and lowering home and mortgage costs for families. The House should pass it immediately.

It was great to celebrate the opening of New Boston’s new fire station and recognize the fire fighters who risk their lives to keep the community safe. I was proud to work with the NH delegation to secure funding for this station, giving them a safe home for years to come. https://t.co/ywp1UtqSHF

Grateful to join the 38th Annual Northeast POW/MIA Network Vigil in Meredith. Our country will always fight to bring our missing service members home and never fail to honor the sacrifice of those who were captured or went missing while keeping America safe, secure, and free. https://t.co/IJSmrFzJwd
Happy 238th Birthday to the Granite State! On this day 238 years ago, New Hampshire became the 9th state to ratify the Constitution - making it the law of the land.

Happy Father’s Day to my husband and best friend, Tom.
 
Ben, Meg, and I are so lucky to have you. I love you. https://t.co/4hWRcYsMjE
Congratulations to Salem’s Caroline Harvey for being the number one pick in the Professional Women’s Hockey League Draft! Wishing you the best of luck this season!

This #Juneteenth I’m thinking of Ona Judge, who fled to New Hampshire 230 years ago after being enslaved at Mount Vernon.

Her story embodies the Live Free or Die spirit and serves as a powerful reminder that the work of equality remains unfinished.

https://t.co/VaPB6EdxvY

A senseless act of gun violence. My heart goes out to the two public works employees shot this morning in Manchester. And I'm grateful for the law enforcement officers who are working to bring the perpetrator to justice. 

https://t.co/8yrs32vKpI

The allegations against Corey Lewandowski point to an unacceptable pattern of corruption and self-dealing. American taxpayers deserve answers and accountability for his conduct at DHS. 
 
That’s why I am launching an investigation into his actions while working for DHS. https://t.co/YYbTpCKa61

The Trump Administration wants to dismantle the Department of Education and put RFK Jr. in charge of services for students with disabilities. That’s unacceptable – and is yet another attack on children that creates confusion and leaves students behind.

https://t.co/Y1h7JUwaK9

It was great to join Granite Staters at last week's Experience New Hampshire event at the Capitol. New Hampshire’s businesses, communities, and people are what make our state so special – and worth fighting for every day. https://t.co/kPeA75r5zY

Happy 251st Birthday to the @USArmy! 

Thank you to all who have served throughout the years to keep our nation safe, secure, and free.

Enjoyed joining the @engageforwomen State of the Majority Summit recently to discuss retirement security and women’s economic opportunity. We need practical, bipartisan solutions that help more Americans build financial security for the years ahead. https://t.co/2a2jkf3oaK

I’m putting @CLewandowski_ on notice.

Even in the most corrupt administration in American history, the allegations of corruption and mismanagement against Corey Lewandowski stand out, and they must be investigated.

Working families can’t afford to “love inflation” like Trump and his billionaire buddies -- they’re too busy paying for it. https://t.co/U8ODp4hSXl
Read the full Joint Economic Committee Minority report here: https://t.co/vjwuRuQPee

Proud to have worked across the aisle to cut outdated red tape in the FDA’s sunscreen review process and help Americans access safe and effective sunscreen products already used around the world.

Happy Pride Month New Hampshire! 🏳️‍🌈

Today, I'm thinking about the generations of LGBTQ+ Americans who helped expand our country’s promise.
 
As we celebrate how far we’ve come, we stand against any hate or division that threaten to drag us back. Because Live Free or Die means
